description: Composition Blue printed jersey for men made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves, round neck, nike swoosh printed on the right sleeve and branding appliquéd on the left sleeve Fit Standard Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Perfect for your football training sessions, this nike T-shirt is engineered with Dri-Fit technology which wicks sweat away and keeps you fresh and comfortable during extended games, while the fashionable graphic print adds style. Pair this tee with your favourite shorts and football cleats or denims and sports shoes for a casual outing.
